steps.title: Find the shared frame claim
steps.content: Text 1 says many Impressionists chose painted frames to distinguish their work from conventional gold Salon frames. Text 2 says painted frames were chosen for aesthetic harmony with the paintings. Both describe deliberate frame selection.

steps.title: Exclude unsupported contrasts
steps.content: B contradicts Text 1 because Pissarro's painted frames were like those of many Impressionists. C reverses Text 2's direction: the frame color was chosen for the painting, not the painting for the frame. D adds an unsupported claim about buyers wanting gold frames. The answer is A.
